purpose: Define the source-backed contract for deterministic swarm contention heatmap ledgers that join lock metrics, scheduler lane metrics, and swarm pressure trace summaries.

scenarios.name: healthy
scenarios.requirement: Required trace, lock, and scheduler fields are present and nominal, yielding pass with stable JSON and text.

scenarios.name: scheduler_hot
scenarios.requirement: High scheduler lane wait or queue percentiles produce a degraded ledger and route to the scheduler owner surface.

scenarios.name: lock_hot
scenarios.requirement: High ContendedMutex wait percentiles rank the lock hotspot first with critical severity.

scenarios.name: queue_hot
scenarios.requirement: Queue hotspots from the swarm pressure trace summary are carried into the heatmap and ranked as degraded evidence.

scenarios.name: missing_fields
scenarios.requirement: Missing trace, lock, or scheduler evidence yields incomplete, never pass.

scenarios.name: stale_baseline
scenarios.requirement: Baselines older than max_baseline_age_secs yield stale_evidence separately from incomplete.

semantic_rules.source_trace_join: At least one fixture consumes summarize_swarm_replay_trace output from src/lab/swarm_replay.rs.
semantic_rules.fail_closed_missing_evidence: Missing trace_summary, lock_metrics, scheduler_lanes, or trace required fields must set verdict to incomplete.
semantic_rules.fail_closed_stale_baseline: A baseline older than the accepted bound must set verdict to stale_evidence unless required fields are already incomplete.
semantic_rules.ranked_hotspots: top_hotspots is sorted by severity, impact score, kind, and key with a stable maximum of eight rows.
semantic_rules.operator_routing: Every hotspot includes owner_surface and owner_bead_hint so the ledger can route follow-up work.
semantic_rules.no_runtime_dependency: The ledger is a deterministic report builder and does not introduce another executor, runtime, or hidden ambient telemetry source.

proof_lane.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_swarm_contention_heatmap cargo test -p asupersync --test swarm_contention_heatmap_contract swarm_contention_heatmap --features test-internals -- --nocapture
proof_lane.scope: Focused contract tests for the swarm contention heatmap ledger and source-backed artifact.

forbidden_semantics: report success when trace, lock, or scheduler evidence is missing
claim fresh baseline support from stale evidence
delete files as part of contention analysis
